sources.name: Parseek
sources.description: Search engine focused on Persian-language content for Iranian sources and regional geopolitical issues.

sources.name: Iran Monitor
sources.description: Near real-time OSINT collection aggregating social media, news agencies, and open broadcast sources on Iran.

sources.name: CENTCOM US-vs-Iran
sources.description: Platform integrating mapping tools, operational reporting, and strategic analysis on US-Iran security environment.

sources.name: Al Zaytouna Centre
sources.description: Publishes academic papers and analysis on Israeli intelligence, regional security, and Middle East geopolitics.

sources.name: Digital Digging Middle East OSINT
sources.description: Curated OSINT resources and tools focused on the Middle East, including Gulf states and Levant countries.

sources.name: PLATracker
sources.description: Monitoring and analysis of China's People's Liberation Army developments, capabilities, and activities.

sources.name: Research Project on China's Defense Affairs (RCDA)
sources.description: Taiwanese research group specializing in Chinese defense matters and PLA analysis.

sources.name: Taiwan Defense News Tracker
sources.description: Timely updates on Taiwanese security issues from local media sources.

sources.name: Recorded Future - China OSINT Research
sources.description: Analysis of PLA open-source intelligence collection methods and military capabilities monitoring.

sources.name: Geopolitics Monitor
sources.description: Real-time monitoring of geopolitical events, conflict zones, and diplomatic developments with curated global sources.

sources.name: Oryx
sources.description: Tracks visually confirmed equipment losses in the Russia-Ukraine war using OSINT from social media and imagery.

sources.name: OSINT For Ukraine
sources.description: Provides OSINT investigations on Russian military infrastructure, child deportations, and Ukraine conflict developments.

sources.name: Ukrinform
sources.description: Official Ukrainian state news agency delivering real-time geopolitical and security updates on Ukraine-Russia conflict.

sources.name: TASS
sources.description: Russian state news agency providing official perspectives on Russia-Ukraine war and Eurasian geopolitics.

sources.name: Anadolu Agency
sources.description: Turkish state-run news agency covering Black Sea security, NATO, Russia-Ukraine tensions, and regional geopolitics.

sources.name: Ministry of National Defence of Ukraine
sources.description: Official Ukrainian defense ministry portal with updates on military operations, threats, and European security.

sources.name: Russian Ministry of Defence
sources.description: Official Russian MoD site publishing briefings, maps, and reports on Ukraine operations and military activities.

sources.name: African Security Analysis Situation Reports
sources.description: Provides detailed situation reports on security dynamics in the Horn of Africa, including Somaliland, Somalia, and threats to critical infrastructure in the Sahel.

sources.name: Council on Foreign Relations Global Conflict Tracker - Violent Extremism in the Sahel
sources.description: Tracks violent extremism by JNIM, ISGS, and others in the Sahel, including expansions into coastal states and shifts in international security partnerships.

sources.name: Institute for Economics & Peace Global Terrorism Index 2024
sources.description: Annual index analyzing terrorism trends in the Sahel, with data on deaths, incidents, organized crime links, and kidnappings in Burkina Faso, Mali, and Niger.

sources.name: US Government Publishing Office - Addressing the Rise of Terrorism in Africa
sources.description: Congressional testimony on Al-Shabaab incursions in Ethiopia and Somalia, JNIM operations in Mali and Burkina Faso, and ISIS activities in the Sahel and Nigeria.

sources.name: Insight Turkey - Türkiye's Security Policy in Sub-Saharan Africa
sources.description: Analyzes Turkey's multi-dimensional security strategy and engagements in Sub-Saharan Africa, including the Sahel and East African regions.

sources.name: Telesur TV
sources.description: Pro-government international news network funded by Venezuela, covering regional geopolitics from a Chavismo perspective.

sources.name: Efecto Cocuyo
sources.description: Independent Venezuelan outlet focused on investigative journalism and fact-checking political developments.

sources.name: Cazadores de Fake News
sources.description: Venezuela's primary OSINT and fact-checking group tracking disinformation and propaganda campaigns.

sources.name: Runrun.es
sources.description: Opposition-leaning digital outlet known for major exposés on government corruption and human rights.

sources.name: El Pitazo
sources.description: Strong regional news coverage across Venezuela, often blocked domestically, providing grassroots intelligence.

sources.name: OSINT Framework
sources.description: Web-based framework organizing OSINT resources by category, including geopolitical and regional intelligence tools applicable to North America.

sources.name: Intelligence X
sources.description: Advanced search platform for deep web, historical data, and public sources useful for geopolitical intelligence on North American events.

sources.name: Internet Archive
sources.description: Digital library archiving historical web pages, news, and documents for tracking geopolitical developments in North America.

sources.name: SpiderFoot
sources.description: Automated reconnaissance tool gathering data from over 100 public sources for targets relevant to North American geopolitical analysis.

sources.name: Digital Digging OSINT Resources by Country
sources.description: Curated list of OSINT tools and resources organized by country, including specific entries for North American nations.
